reviews.review_msg: Great Prof! really knowledgeable and interested about project management. Explained everything clearfully. Final was straightforward. Need to get a good group for this project though, since most of it is group work.

Blaze taught the Managing Information Systems as part of the Graduate Diploma of Business Administration. Blaze is probably a good lecturer but was checked out for the class. Not many lecturers were engaged though. A technical advisor answered most questions. A waste of money...

One of the best profs at SFU. Really intelligent and adds value to the course material. Gives so much insight into readings and cases. If you get a chance, take a course with Blaize, you will not regret it. Marking is relatively easy as long as you put in some effort. 5 out of 5! To top it off, she is very nice, up to date and easy going!

Best prof I ever had at SFU.  Awesome lectures, lots of interactive/interesting discussions and learned a lot from her.  If you get her for 468, consider yourself very fortunate and lucky.  Definitely won't regret it.
